title: Ubiquiti UniFi AP U7 In-Wall
description: The U7-IW is a WiFi 7 access point from the UniFi family, designed for in-wall installation. Dual-band WiFi 7 offers a maximum modulation speed of up to 2.9Gbps in the 5 GHz band and up to 688Mbps in the 2.4 GHz band. For network connectivity, it features a rear (1) 2.5G ETH port, which also serves as a power input via PoE 802.3af/at or passive PoE 42.5 to 57V DC . Even after installation, you will still have access to (2) 2.5G ETH ports, one of which supports PoE-OUT for connecting an… To manage the device, you need to download the official software called UniFi Network from the official website, which allows full network control. A significant advantage of UniFi Network is that it is completely free with no limitations ! This centralized management system enables you to upload maps, configure key settings such as SSID, guest accounts, landing pages, monitor traffic statistics, and view a list and status of associated clients â all quickly and easily Roaming â seamless transition between APs without disconnections Wireless uplink â ideal for locations where a data cable cannot be installed Up to 8 SSID Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Voucher system Load balancing â maintaining even distribution of load / switching clients Bandwidth limitation for each SSID Device Wall-mounting plate Screws
